grant_title: Foundation for Pennsylvania Watersheds: Convening Grants
geographic_restrictions: Pennsylvania (from the Ohio border to the Susquehanna River)
project_area: Freshwater Conservation, Water Resource Management, Habitat & Ecosystem Restoration
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations with 501(c)(3) status in Pennsylvania (from the Ohio border to the Susquehanna River) are eligible to apply for grants up to $2,000 for collaborative projects aimed at protecting and restoring water resources.
